nasb.text: “When you make a vow to the Lord your God, you shall not delay to pay it, for it would be sin in you, and the Lord your God will surely require it of you.

esv.text: “If you make a vow to the Lord your God, you shall not delay fulfilling it, for the Lord your God will surely require it of you, and you will be guilty of sin.

cnv.text: “如果你向耶和華你的　神許了願，就不可遲延還願，因為耶和華你的　神必向你追討，那時你就有罪了。

ccb.text: “如果你们向你们的上帝耶和华许愿，不可迟迟不还愿，因为你们的上帝耶和华必追讨许愿不还的罪。
